originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Score Normalization Transform for PufferLib Hyperparameter Optimization
summary: Worked on implementing and debugging a score normalization transform for PufferLib's hyperparameter optimization. Tested the transform on synthetic data distributions (linear, log, percentile) to ensure correct output scaling. Also assisted a user with logging issues and recommended adding a 3D renderer.
